text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh! Trainer, ya wouldn't happen to be feelin'
under the weather, would ya?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Now, now, none of that! There ain't no foolin' my eyes!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that settles it! Today's training will feature
Taiki's Special Happy Course!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: The EXTRA happy version! I need to grab me 'bout five hundred party crackers!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! We'll turn that frown upside down!
Just you wait!
